Game.Name: Pachinko Challenger (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Pachinko Challenger is a pachinko game developed by Carrozzeria for the Super Nintendo Entertainment System.
Game.Notes: Pachinko Challenger is a pachinko game developed by Carrozzeria for the Super Nintendo Entertainment System. Carrozzeria's last pachinko game was Pachi-Slot Land: Pachi Pachi Coin no Densetsu from 1994. The protagonist is an anonymous pachinko fan who must ascend the floors of a pachinko parlor by winning enough pachinko balls on the various machines of the present floor. It's one of a handful of pachinko simulators for the Super Famicom that has a storyline to follow.
